creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri Dec 13 07:27:37 2013
New Revision: 336320
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336320

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.0
  - While I'm here, update LICENSE
  
  Changes:	https://github.com/theseer/DirectoryScanner/commits/master
  PR:		ports/184680
  Submitted by:	Gasol Wu <gasol.wu@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/Makefile
  head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/Makefile	Fri Dec 13 07:27:24 2013	(r336319)
+++ head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/Makefile	Fri Dec 13 07:27:37 2013	(r336320)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	DirectoryScanner
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pear.netpirates.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pear-TheSeer_
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pear-TheSeer_
 MAINTAINER=	gasol.wu@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Recursive directory scanner and filter
 
-LICENSE=	BSD
+LICENSE=	BSD2CLAUSE
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	pear>=1.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear \
 		${PEARDIR}/.channels/pear.netpirates.net.reg:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear-channel-theseer
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ USE_PHP=	fileinfo
 PEAR_CHANNEL=	theseer
 PEAR_AUTOINSTALL=	yes
 
-IGNORE_WITH_PHP=52
+IGNORE_WITH_PHP=	52
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 .include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/pear/bsd.pear.mk"

Modified: head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/distinfo	Fri Dec 13 07:27:24 2013	(r336319)
+++ head/devel/pear-TheSeer_DirectoryScanner/distinfo	Fri Dec 13 07:27:37 2013	(r336320)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (PEAR/DirectoryScanner-1.1.0.tgz) = 8d0c269cd5b386c9aebd9fc0080771adb00833262906434cd30d0c872cdb04e6
-SIZE (PEAR/DirectoryScanner-1.1.0.tgz) = 3644
+SHA256 (PEAR/DirectoryScanner-1.2.0.tgz) = 7716867c405b617f371befebec5e03fc6330ef6731d7d48e76b4d2dd3b19caad
+SIZE (PEAR/DirectoryScanner-1.2.0.tgz) = 3827
